mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_job_collection (user_id, job_id, collect_time, is_deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{jobId}, NOW(), 0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE is_deleted = 0, collect_time = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_job_collection WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY collect_time DESC
SELECT * FROM user_job_collection WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND job_id = #{jobId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_job_collection WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM user_job_collection WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY collect_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
